title: Tome III Act 10: The Scales and the Hide

story.text:
# 📖 Tome III Act 10: The Scales and the Hide
**act** · shared · narrative

The dragon-anatomy register meets the cosmological tier. Scales (publicly visible witness) ⊥ Hide (privately preserved). Sister-discipline to the Aletheia/Lethe complement-pair.
